topic: My welcome mat moves four feet to the left every Tuesday night and now it is hanging off the porch
title: My Welcome Mat Moves Four Feet to the Left Every Tuesday Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My welcome mat moves four feet to the left every Tuesday night. It has been moving west for ten months.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a residential front porch at dawn with a brown welcome mat visible four feet away from the doormat's normal position by the front door, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two bedroom rental. Quiet street. I live alone.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a small single story rental house in a quiet residential neighborhood at dusk, no people visible, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a rolled up newspaper resting on a wooden porch beside the doormat at dawn, dim early light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed it last fall. Mat had been straight Tuesday evening.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a brown welcome mat placed squarely in front of a wooden front door at dusk, porch light on, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a porch at dawn with leaves scattered across the wooden boards and the welcome mat displaced to the left of the door, dim early morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Weighted it with two bricks Tuesday night. Wednesday morning the mat had moved. Bricks still on top.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a welcome mat with two red bricks resting on top of it sitting four feet from the front door of a residential porch, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pointed my doorbell camera at the porch.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smart doorbell camera mounted beside a front door angled down at the porch boards, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Camera showed nothing. Mat was four feet west by sunrise.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying doorbell camera footage of a porch with the welcome mat visibly in a different position than its starting frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Drove wood screws through the corners. Anchored it to the porch boards.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand using a power drill to drive a screw through the corner of a brown welcome mat into wooden porch boards, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The mat moved. Screws still inside. The porch boards now have a row of holes leading west.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden front porch with a single line of small drilled holes running across the boards from the front door toward the left edge of the porch, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have stopped trying to anchor it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small residential porch with a welcome mat sitting near the far edge of the porch boards almost off the steps, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last Wednesday it was hanging off the edge of the porch. Only a corner still on the boards.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a brown welcome mat draped over the edge of a wooden porch with only one corner remaining on the boards, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
